summary: Comprehensive testing completed for nutrition and cost analysis assistant. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are working excellently. AI integration with GPT-5.2 is functional and processing receipts correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Login test failed with hardcoded credentials (test logic issue, not API issue)
minor_issues.impact: Test suite issue only - actual login functionality works

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor HTTP status code difference - both indicate unauthorized

design_issues.issue: Invalid login error message may not be showing clearly in UI

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and feature cards
User registration flow - creates users with JWT tokens
User login flow - authenticates existing users
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login
Dashboard loads and shows stats correctly
Analyze page with both image upload and manual text entry tabs
Analysis with manual text input using sample receipt - AI processes 10 items
Analysis results page shows items table, rankings, best/worst value insights
Analysis history appears in dashboard after creation
Delete analysis functionality works with confirmation dialog
AI analysis processing generates intelligent insights and calorie estimates
Backend API health check and basic endpoints
User authentication system with JWT tokens
